tell me the purchase are done which project is wadi

Here are all the **Purchase Orders** linked to the **Wadi al Safwa BUILDING (UG+B+G+11+GYM+R)** project:

| PO # | Vendor | Date | Total (AED) | Status | Items |
|------|--------|------|-------------|--------|-------|
| **P00007** | Rodel | 24-May-2026 | **585,930.45** | Purchase | ROAD BASE, Anti Termite Spray, CLAMP 3" Suction Dewatering Hose |
| **P00008** | Bassem | 24-May-2026 | **28,350.00** | Purchase | Site Insurance |
| **P00010** | Ikram Khan | 24-May-2026 | **52,500.00** | Purchase | Site Drawings |
| **P00011** | Bassem | 24-May-2026 | **105,000.00** | Purchase | Site Approvals |
| **P00012** | Rowad al khaleej Building | 24-May-2026 | **739,200.00** | Purchase | HOLLOW BLOCKS 10" (8,000 qty) |
| **P00013** | Rowad al khaleej Building | 24-May-2026 | **99,750.00** | Purchase | HOLLOW BLOCKS 12" (1,000 qty) |
| **P00014** | Rowad al khaleej Building | 24-May-2026 | **32,917.50** | Purchase | HOLLOW BLOCKS 12" (330 qty) |
| **P00015** | Rowad al khaleej Building | 24-May-2026 | **29,925.00** | Purchase | HOLLOW BLOCKS 12" (300 qty) |
| **P00018** | Rowad al khaleej Building | 24-May-2026 | **113,400.00** | Purchase | HOLLOW BLOCKS 8" (1,200 qty) |

**Summary:**
- **Total Purchase Orders for Wadi al Safwa Project:** **9 POs**
- **Total Amount:** **AED 1,786,972.95**
- **Main Vendors:** Rowad al khaleej Building (blocks), Bassem (insurance/approvals), Rodel (site materials), Ikram Khan (drawings)
- **Main Materials:** Hollow blocks (8", 10", 12"), Road base, Site insurance/approvals/drawings

Here is the **Project Estimation** for **Wadi al Safwa BUILDING (UG+B+G+11+GYM+R)**:

---

## 📊 Project Estimation Summary

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Project** | Wadi al Safwa BUILDING (UG+B+G+11+GYM+R) |
| **Duration** | 01-Feb-2026 → 30-Nov-2026 (10 months) |
| **Total Budget** | **AED 36,670,000.00** |
| **Total Estimated Amount** | **AED 36,670,000.00** |

---

### 📋 Milestone Breakdown (2 Phases)

| # | Milestone | % of Budget | Amount (AED) | Cost Price (AED) | Period |
|---|-----------|:-----------:|:------------:|:----------------:|--------|
| 1 | **🏗️ Civil Works** | **70%** | **25,669,000.00** | 29,056,000.00 | Feb → Jun 2026 |
| 2 | **🔧 MEP Works** | **30%** | **11,001,000.00** | 13,450,000.00 | Jul → Nov 2026 |
| | **Total** | **100%** | **36,670,000.00** | **42,506,000.00** | |

---

### Key Notes:
- **Civil Works** (70%) — covers all structural, masonry, block works, roofing, waterproofing, insulation — estimated at **AED 25.67M**
- **MEP Works** (30%) — covers Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, HVAC, drainage — estimated at **AED 11.00M**
- The **Cost Price** (total cost to company) is estimated at **AED 42.51M**, while the **selling price/budget** is **AED 36.67M**

Would you like to open the project estimation record or see more details?
